headline: Is Church & Dwight Stock Outperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Church & Dwight has outperformed the S&P 500 recently, and analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Beat the Market the Zacks Way: IPG Photonics, Celanese, Costco in Focus
summary: IPG Photonics has surged 43.1% since a Zacks Rank #1 upgrade, showcasing how the firm's stock-picking approach is beating a volatile market.
